name: Case Study: Jazz Group Leadership
history: PhD student in a science field. Deep involvement in music; previously led a college band and currently participates in a jazz group. Offered a leadership position in the jazz group and declined. Reports mental health struggles. Feels disconnected from colleagues in the scientific work environment due to differing values and work habits.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must avoid taking on too much responsibility to prevent failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I take on more than I can handle, I will fail and be overwhelmed.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of leadership roles and additional responsibilities.
situation: Offered a leadership position in the jazz group and decided not to accept it due to concern about managing responsibilities alongside PhD work and mental health.
auto_thought: I can't handle the pressure of a leadership role right now.
behavior: Declined the leadership position in the jazz group.
